hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; pnpm biome check --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; } || true

pre-commit.description: Run TypeScript type checking before commit

pre-commit.command: ! grep -rn 'console\.log' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' apps/ packages/ | grep -v node_modules | grep -v routeTree.gen.ts
pre-commit.description: Check for console.log in production code before commit
